external_services.service_name: Application for Accreditation as Suppliers of the Pasalubong Center
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Accreditation as Suppliers of the Pasalubong Center
external_services.office: Lipa City Cooperatives Office – Pasalubong Center
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business
external_services.who_may_avail: Cooperatives, micro, small and medium enterprises (MSMEs)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the list of products available to the Lipa City Cooperative Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Receive, evaluate, and approve the list of products
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist, City Cooperatives Officer

steps.client_step: 2. Fill-out the Consignment Agreement Form
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive and file the Consignment Agreement Form
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist, Administrative Aide III

steps.client_step: 3. Endorse the products to be displayed/sold at the Pasalubong Center
steps.agency_action: 3. Accept, test and enhance the packaging of the products
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist, Administrative Aide III

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: BOD/GA resolution, Cert of Registration, Articles/By-Laws, Audited & Interim Financial Statements, Surety Bond, Promissory note, Loan proposal, CAPRIS, ITR, Mayor's Permit

steps.client_step: 1. Submit approved BOD/GA Resolution
steps.agency_action: 1. Receive resolution for initial action
steps.person_responsible: City Mayor, City Cooperatives Officer

steps.client_step: 2. Submit loan application and requirements
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.11: Evaluation, CI/BI (2 days), Recommendation, Endorsement to City Admin/Mayor, Document preparation, Vouching, Processing, and Briefing
steps.person_responsible: City Cooperatives Officer, Supervising/Senior Coop Dev Specialist

steps.client_step: 3. Claim the check
steps.agency_action: 3. Award the check to the cooperative
steps.person_responsible: City Mayor

external_services.service_name: Application for Lipa City Cooperative Development Council (LCCDC) Membership
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Properly filled-up membership form, BOD resolution, CDA Registration, Certificate of Compliance, Bylaws and Articles of Incorporation
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Cooperatives Office / Applicant cooperative

steps.client_step: 1. Submit properly filled-up membership form and attachments
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Receive, evaluate and recommend approval
steps.person_responsible: Senior Cooperative Development Specialist, City Cooperative Officer

steps.client_step: 1. Attend meeting called for the celebration
steps.agency_action: 1. Conduct meetings and solicit participation
steps.person_responsible: Supervising/Senior Cooperative Development Specialist

steps.client_step: 2. Participate in different activities
steps.agency_action: 2. Facilitate various activities
steps.person_responsible: Supervising/Senior Cooperative Development Specialist

external_services.service_name: Request for Certificate of Good Standing
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: CDA registration, Certificate of Compliance, By-Laws and Articles of Cooperation

steps.client_step: 1. Submit properly filled-up application form and requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1: Receive and evaluate documents
steps.person_responsible: Senior Cooperative Development Specialist

steps.client_step: 2. Claim the Certificate of Good Standing
steps.agency_action: 2. Prepare and issue the Certificate
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI

external_services.service_name: Request for Conduct of Cooperative Orientation Seminar
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Conduct of Cooperative Orientation Seminar
external_services.who_may_avail: All prospective members of a cooperative

steps.client_step: 1. File technical service request form
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Evaluate and approve request
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist, City Cooperative Officer

steps.client_step: 2. Attend the scheduled Seminar
steps.agency_action: 2. Facilitate conduct of orientation
steps.person_responsible: Supervising/Senior Cooperative Development Specialist

external_services.service_name: Request for Technical Assistance in the Preparation of Registration Documents
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Technical Assistance in the Preparation of Registration Documents

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Accomplished technical service request form, Certification of pre-registration seminar

steps.client_step: 1. File technical service request form
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.4: Evaluation, Approval, Document assistance (5 days), Review (2 days), and CDA endorsement
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist, City Cooperative Officer

external_services.service_name: Request for the Conduct of Cooperative Refresher Courses and Hands-on Trainings
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for the Conduct of Cooperative Refresher Courses and Hands-on Trainings

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Accomplished technical service request form, Confirmation slip

steps.client_step: 1. File technical service request form
steps.agency_action: 1.1: Evaluate and approve request
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist, City Cooperative's Officer

steps.client_step: 2. Attend the scheduled trainings and seminars
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.3: Facilitate training (1 day), prepare and award Certificate of Completion
steps.person_responsible: Supervising/Senior Cooperative Development Specialist, City Cooperative's Officer

external_services.service_name: Request for the Conduct of Mandatory and Advanced or Specialized Training Courses for Cooperatives
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for the Conduct of Mandatory and Advanced or Specialized Training Courses for Cooperatives

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Accomplished technical service request form – 1 original copy

steps.client_step: 1. File technical service request form at the City Cooperatives Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.3: Approve request, prepare work program for specialized/mandatory trainings, and send invitation letters via electronic communication
steps.person_responsible: City Cooperative Officer, Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist

steps.client_step: 2. Confirm attendance by returning the confirmation slip through electronic communication
steps.agency_action: 2. Collect confirmation slips
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist, Senior Cooperative Development Specialist

steps.client_step: 3. Attend scheduled trainings and receive Certificate of Completion
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.2: Facilitate training conduct and issue Certificate of Completion
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist, Senior Cooperative Development Specialist

external_services.service_name: Request for the Conduct of Pre-Membership Education Seminar
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for the Conduct of Pre-Membership Education Seminar
external_services.who_may_avail: All prospective members of a cooperative

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Accomplished technical service request form – 1 original copy

steps.client_step: 1. File technical service request form at the Lipa City Cooperatives Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Evaluate and approve technical service request form
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist, City Cooperative Officer

steps.client_step: 2. Attend the scheduled PMES and receive the Certificate of Completion
steps.agency_action: 2.1-2.2: Facilitate PMES conduct and prepare Certificate of Completion
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist, Administrative Aide VI

steps.client_step: 3. Claim the Certificate of Completion
steps.agency_action: 3. Award Certificate of Completion to completers
steps.person_responsible: City Cooperative's Officer

external_services.service_name: Request for the Conduct of Pre-Registration Seminar (PRS)
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for the Conduct of Pre-Registration Seminar (PRS)
external_services.who_may_avail: All prospective individuals who would like to form and register a cooperative

steps.client_step: 1. File technical service request form at the Lipa City Cooperatives Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1-1.2: Approve request and forward form to the Cooperative Development Authority
steps.person_responsible: City Cooperatives Officer, Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist

steps.client_step: 2. Make a follow-up on the PRS schedule
steps.agency_action: 2. Coordinate approved schedule with the requesting party
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist, Project Development Assistant

steps.client_step: 3. Attend the scheduled Pre-Registration Seminar
steps.agency_action: 3. Assist in conduct of Pre-Registration Seminar
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist

external_services.service_name: Application to Avail Local Investment Incentives
external_services.office: Lipa City Cooperatives Office – Local Economic Development and Investment Promotion
external_services.who_may_avail: New and existing enterprises within Investment Priority Areas (IPAs)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Single Prop: Filled application (2), DTI Registration (2), Audited Financial Statements (2), Other LGU requirements
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Cooperatives Office, DTI, BIR, Applicant

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Corp/Partner: Filled application (2), Articles of Incorporation (2), SEC Reg (2), Good Standing (1), Resolution, ECC/Non-Compliance
checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Cooperatives Office, SEC, Applicant, BIR, DENR-EMB

steps.client_step: 1. File and submit application form and documentary requirements
steps.agency_action: 1-3: Receive/pre-assess documents, register in logbook, and issue Order of Payment
steps.person_responsible: Cooperative Development Specialist I / Designated LEDIPO

steps.client_step: 2. Pay the filing fee at the Lipa City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II

steps.client_step: 3. Present Official Receipt to the LEDIPO
steps.agency_action: 3.1-3.3: Ocular inspection, evaluation report for Board action, and issue Order of Payment for approved application
steps.person_responsible: Cooperative Development Specialist I / Designated LEDIPO

steps.client_step: 4. Pay the registration fee at the City Treasurer's Office
steps.agency_action: 4.1-4.2: Receive payment, issue OR, and prepare Certificate of Registration
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II, Designated LEDIPO

steps.client_step: 5. Claim Certificate of Registration
steps.agency_action: 5. Issue Certificate of Registration
steps.person_responsible: Designated LEDIPO

service_notice.service_name: Business with capital of P100 Million and above but less than P300 Million
Business with capital of P300 Million and above but less than P500 Million
Business with capital of P500 Million
